sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13716" key="a)po/sklhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόσκλησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13716.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drying up, withering,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
